touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn outreach to Michael Evans at PixelGear introducing our conversation intelligence platform and its ROI for sales teams. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message to Michael. He responded expressing initial interest in learning more about how we help sales teams with productivity and asking for a brief overview.

questions_asked.question: Can you send me a quick overview of what you do?
questions_asked.answer: Shared one-pager on conversation intelligence platform focused on automating note-taking and CRM updates for sales teams

touches.ai_summary: Sent overview deck and case study showing 40% time savings for sales reps. Michael confirmed he reviewed materials and is interested in discussing further for his team of 10 reps.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native Salesforce integration with automatic field mapping

next_steps: Schedule qualification call for next week

touches.ai_summary: Calendar invite sent for qualification call. Michael confirmed availability and mentioned he's currently evaluating a couple of options including Fireflies.

Initial qualification call with Michael. Discussed current pain points around manual note-taking eating up 2-3 hours per rep daily. Team of 10 reps doing 200+ calls/week. Currently using basic Zoom recordings with no automation.

questions_asked.question: What's your current process for capturing call notes and updating CRM?
questions_asked.answer: Reps manually type notes during calls and spend 15-20 min after each call updating Salesforce

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Explained our unlimited automation tier vs per-seat limitations, will send detailed comparison

next_steps: Follow up on budget and timeline

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call diving into technical requirements. Michael confirmed budget range of $10-12K annually and mentioned he needs to bring in his two Sales Managers (Isaac Wu and Elena Allen) for technical validation.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Looking to implement by end of quarter, about 6-8 weeks out

questions_asked.question: Can we do a pilot with 3-4 reps first?
questions_asked.answer: Explained our approach allows starting with core team and expanding, which aligns well

next_steps: Loop in Sales Managers for discovery

touches.ai_summary: Email introducing Isaac Wu and Elena Allen to the thread. Shared agenda for discovery session focused on workflow integration and specific use cases for their team. Michael confirmed Isaac and Elena's availability.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled with extended team

touches.ai_summary: Brief discovery check-in call with Michael before larger team meeting. He mentioned procurement is asking about security compliance and wants SOC 2 documentation. Also confirmed they're still looking at Fireflies but concerned about feature limitations.

questions_asked.question: Do you have SOC 2 Type II certification?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, provided link to security documentation and compliance portal

objections: Need to validate security posture before moving forward

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Michael, Isaac, and Elena. Walked through their current workflow challenges, integration needs with Salesforce and Outreach, and specific pain points around CRM data quality. Team is aligned on the problem and eager to see solution in action.

questions_asked.question: What are your biggest challenges with current note-taking process?
questions_asked.answer: Inconsistent CRM data, reps forgetting to log activities, managers can't coach effectively without call context

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the AI summaries and field mappings?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable templates and field mapping, can match their existing Salesforce structure

questions_asked.question: What's the onboarding process and time to value?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 1-2 weeks for full team rollout, reps see value from first call

touches.ai_summary: Extended technical evaluation session with Isaac and Elena. Walked through live demo using their actual Salesforce instance (sandbox). Configured custom field mappings, tested Outreach integration, and ran through various call scenarios. Team impressed with accuracy and automation depth.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the fields that get auto-populated in Salesforce?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, demonstrated custom field mapping builder and saved their preferred template

questions_asked.question: How does it handle multi-speaker calls with clients?
questions_asked.answer: Showed speaker identification and role-based summaries, works well with 2-5 participants

questions_asked.question: What happens if the AI gets something wrong?
questions_asked.answer: Reps can edit any auto-generated content before it syncs, includes confidence scores

objections: Concerned about accuracy with technical sales calls and industry jargon
next_steps: Provide trial access for Isaac and Elena

touches.ai_summary: Sent trial access credentials to Isaac and Elena. Included quick-start guide and asked them to test with 3-5 real calls over the next week. Michael confirmed they'll report back on results.
next_steps: Check in mid-week on trial progress

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation debrief with Isaac and Elena. They tested with 8 calls total and were impressed with transcription quality and CRM automation. Isaac noted it correctly captured technical product details. Elena mentioned one instance where sentiment analysis was off but overall very positive feedback.

questions_asked.question: Can we add custom vocabulary for our product terms?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, explained custom vocabulary training and showed how to add industry-specific terms

questions_asked.question: How do we handle calls with competitors mentioned?
questions_asked.answer: Demonstrated competitive intelligence tagging and automatic alerts for competitor mentions

questions_asked.question: What would make this a must-have versus nice-to-have for your team?
questions_asked.answer: Isaac: CRM data quality for forecasting. Elena: Time savings for reps to do more calls

touches.ai_summary: Comprehensive demo with Michael, Isaac, and Elena showing trial results and ROI analysis. Calculated 15 hours/week time savings across team. Michael asked about bringing in RevOps (Alex Park) for analytics review but wants to see pricing first.

questions_asked.question: What analytics and reporting do you provide for managers?
questions_asked.answer: Showed dashboard with call volume, talk-time ratios, question tracking, and coaching insights

questions_asked.question: How does this compare to what Fireflies offers?
questions_asked.answer: Highlighted unlimited automation vs per-seat limits, deeper Salesforce integration, and custom field mapping

questions_asked.question: Are you ready to move forward with a proposal?
questions_asked.answer: Michael: Yes, but need to stay within $10K budget and get Alex involved for reporting validation

next_steps: Include Alex Park in next steps

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Michael reviewing pricing for 10 seats on unlimited automation tier. Standard pricing came to $11,200. Michael expressed concern about budget constraints and mentioned Fireflies quoted them $7,500. Discussed value differential.

questions_asked.question: Can you work with us on pricing to fit our $10K budget?
questions_asked.answer: Explained pricing structure and mentioned possibility of discussing with sales leadership

objections: Budget is firm at $10K, Fireflies came in significantly lower

touches.ai_summary: Sent revised proposal at $8,000 for 10 seats (28.6% discount) to meet budget. Included ROI calculator showing $47K value from time savings. Emphasized unlimited automation advantage over Fireflies. Michael acknowledged receipt and said he needs to review with team.
next_steps: Michael to review with Isaac, Elena, and Alex

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled proposal review call was rescheduled by Michael due to conflict. He mentioned in email that team is aligned on moving forward but wants Alex Park to review the analytics capabilities before final approval. Rescheduled for two days later.
touches.reschedule_reason: prospect asked to push by a week

touches.ai_summary: Extended meeting with Michael, Isaac, Elena, and Alex Park (RevOps Analyst). Alex asked detailed questions about reporting API and data exports. Team confirmed they're ready to move forward. Michael mentioned he still needs executive sign-off from VP Sales or CFO for any contract over $5K but hasn't looped them in yet.

questions_asked.question: Can we export raw call data for our own analytics?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full API access and CSV exports included, showed documentation

questions_asked.question: How is data retained and can we control retention policies?
questions_asked.answer: Configurable retention from 90 days to unlimited, GDPR compliant deletion

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to approve this purchase?
questions_asked.answer: Michael: Need VP Sales approval for anything over $5K, shouldn't be an issue but need to loop her in

questions_asked.question: When can we get on her calendar?
questions_asked.answer: Michael: Will bring it up in their 1:1 this week and get back to us

next_steps: Schedule exec alignment call if needed

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Michael. He mentioned VP Sales (Sarah Chen) has concerns about committing $8K without seeing competitive analysis. She's asking why not just go with Fireflies at lower price point. Michael is championing the unlimited automation value but needs help building business case.

questions_asked.question: Can you provide a detailed feature comparison with Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Promised to send comprehensive comparison with ROI impact of feature differences

questions_asked.question: Would it help to have a brief call with Sarah to address concerns directly?
questions_asked.answer: Michael: Let me try first with the comparison doc, will escalate if needed

objections: VP Sales questioning value premium over Fireflies

touches.ai_summary: Sent comprehensive Fireflies comparison highlighting unlimited automation, advanced Salesforce integration, custom field mapping, and superior analytics. Included case study from similar-sized sales team showing 3x ROI. Michael acknowledged and said he's presenting to Sarah tomorrow.

Follow-up email checking on Sarah's feedback. Michael responded that she's supportive but asking if we can do $7,500 to match Fireflies pricing. He's advocating for the value but mentioned she has final say on budget allocation.

Pricing negotiation call with Michael. Explained that $8,000 is already 28.6% discount and represents minimum viable pricing for 10-seat unlimited tier. Offered to hold pricing for 2 weeks if they can commit to decision timeline. Michael appreciates the urgency and said he'll push back on Sarah's $7,500 request with the ROI data.

questions_asked.question: If we sign by end of month can you include extended onboarding support?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, can include white-glove onboarding with dedicated CSM for first 30 days

questions_asked.question: What's your confidence level on closing at $8K?
questions_asked.answer: Michael: 70-75%, team loves it but Sarah is cost-conscious, working on getting her comfortable

objections: VP Sales still pushing for lower price to match Fireflies
next_steps: Michael to have final discussion with Sarah

touches.ai_summary: Final follow-up email with contract at $8,000 including extended onboarding support. Reiterated 2-week pricing hold and ROI value. Michael confirmed he's meeting with Sarah this afternoon and expects to have final answer by end of week. Isaac and Elena are ready to start implementation once approved.
